## [00:00 - 01:13]

Hey, it's Jason Fladlin here. I am known as the nine figure webinar guy. I've been doing webinars for over 15 years. My goal is to help you, especially if you've never done a webinar before, go from, I don't even know what that thing is and what that thing does to completely creating such a captivating presentation for your audience and your niche and your industry or wherever you want to live that totally revolutionizes your customers experiences and makes them want to do business with you. So I'm going to break down things that I learned the hard way over the last 15 years designing over 32 different presentations that have done at least six figures. Some of them have done seven figures. Some of them have done even high eight figures in and of themselves, just singular webinars. I have done webinars in the software space, in the coaching space, in the affiliate space, in the business side, in the personal development space, anywhere and everywhere in between. My clientele is the who's who's. I've even consulted with Zoom itself and taught their webinar users on how to do better webinars. So now let me teach you the secrets of how to do the most effective webinars possible.
